title: Zappfresh Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Zappfresh Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zappfresh Advisory Limited! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zappfresh Advisory Limited:
Zappfresh Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zappfresh Advisory Limited!
